questionHtml: Outline the steps to produce a 10 % egg white solution.
markschemeHtml:
1. measure 10 g/parts egg whites;
  2. add to 90 g/parts of water;

Accept use of volume instead of mass.

meta.title: Outline the steps to produce a 10 % egg white solution.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
